label: Low Header Pressure
description: `header_pressure_psi` < 75 PSI; `low_air_alarm` = TRUE. Multi-machine impact: depalletizer vacuum, filler bowl, capper chute, and case packer cylinders all affected.
likely_cause: Compressor offline, major distribution leak, demand surge (CIP simultaneous), isolation valve partially closed.
recommended_action: Check `compressor_running`; if FALSE see AS003. Walk headers for leak; check isolation valves on all machines; verify CIP is not drawing simultaneously.

label: Air Dryer Fault
description: `dryer_fault` = TRUE. Moisture enters compressed air distribution.
likely_cause: Refrigerant leak, dryer heater fault, condensate drain blocked, high ambient temperature.
recommended_action: Check dryer fault display; verify condensate drain auto-purge; call refrigeration technician if refrigerant issue.

label: Compressor Offline
description: `compressor_running` = FALSE. Full plant air loss imminent once receiver drains.
likely_cause: Motor thermal overload tripped, unloader valve stuck, high-temperature shutdown, power loss to compressor panel.
recommended_action: Check compressor control panel fault code; reset thermal overload if tripped (allow cool-down 10 min); if high-temp shutdown, check compressor room ambient < 100 °F. Call compressor technician if fault recurs.

missing_evidence.note: fault text references 'overload' but the sim exposes no such signal to corroborate it

label: Low Air Alarm Persistent
description: `low_air_alarm` remains TRUE > 5 min with `compressor_running` = TRUE. Major leak or excess demand confirmed.
likely_cause: Ruptured line, open bleed valve, excessive simultaneous demand from multiple machines.
recommended_action: Immediately shut down non-essential pneumatic consumers; walk headers systematically for leak; escalate to maintenance supervisor.

label: No Cap Present
description: `cap_present` = FALSE; chute empty or sensor failure.
likely_cause: Cap hopper exhausted, cap orienter jam, photo-eye dirty.
recommended_action: Refill cap hopper; inspect chute and orienter; clean sensor.

label: Over-torque Reject
likely_cause: Worn clutch pads, wrong cap format, setpoint too high.
recommended_action: Inspect clutch pads; verify cap spec; check torque setpoint.

label: Under-torque Reject
likely_cause: Glazed clutch pads, worn chuck, weak torque-head spring.
recommended_action: Scuff or replace clutch pads; check chuck fit; verify spring.

label: Jam Detected
likely_cause: Doubled bottle, dropped cap, bottle neck fragment.
recommended_action: Clear jam per SOP; inspect carousel; reset.

label: Interlock / E-Stop
description: Startup prevented by interlock or E-stop.
likely_cause: E-stop latched, guard open, Filler 01 faulted, chute empty.
recommended_action: Clear interlock; confirm upstream ready; reset PackML.

label: Torque Variance High
likely_cause: Mixed cap orientation, worn spindle bearings, non-uniform clutch pads.
recommended_action: Inspect cap orientation; check spindle bearings; inspect all clutch pads.

missing_evidence.note: fault text references 'bearing' but the sim exposes no such signal to corroborate it

label: Low Air Pressure
description: AirSystem01 `header_pressure_psi` < 80 PSI — reject cylinders may fail to extend.
likely_cause: AirSystem01 compressor fault or distribution loss.
recommended_action: Address AirSystem01 fault first; do not run capper with low air.

label: E-Stop / Interlock
description: Machine halted by E-Stop or interlock.
likely_cause: E-stop pressed, guard door open, Labeler 01 faulted.
recommended_action: Clear E-stop/interlock; confirm upstream ready; reset PackML.

label: Case Former Not Ready
likely_cause: Glue temp below threshold, blank magazine empty, mandrel sensor mis-aligned.
recommended_action: Wait for glue warm-up; reload blank magazine; check mandrel sensors.

label: Glue Level Low
likely_cause: Glue hopper consumed.
recommended_action: Add approved food-grade hot-melt pellets to hopper; wait 3–5 min.

label: Jam Detected
description: `jam_detected` = TRUE; carousel or discharge blocked. Upstream accumulation will build.
likely_cause: Tipped bottle, deformed case blank, palletizer discharge backed up.
recommended_action: Safe-to-enter; clear jam per SOP; reset; confirm upstream ready.

label: Glue Temp Fault
likely_cause: Heater fault, thermocouple drift, setpoint error, cold start.
recommended_action: Inspect heater element; verify setpoint; allow full warm-up cycle.

label: High Reject Count
likely_cause: Inadequate glue bead, low air pressure (fold cylinder), temp too low.
recommended_action: Check glue bead; verify AirSystem01 pressure; check fold cylinder timing.

label: Low Air Pressure
likely_cause: AirSystem01 fault.
recommended_action: Address AirSystem01 first; do not run case former with low air.

label: Valve Fault
description: `valve_fault` = TRUE; a CIP valve is not responding to command.
likely_cause: Solenoid coil burned out, actuator seized, position switch failure.
recommended_action: Identify faulted valve via HMI valve status screen; check solenoid coil; replace actuator if seized.

label: Supply Temp Low
likely_cause: Heater element failure, thermostat drift, inadequate hot-water supply.
recommended_action: Check heater element circuit; verify thermostat setpoint; confirm hot-water supply pressure.

label: Conductivity Out of Range
description: `conductivity` outside expected band for current step.
likely_cause: Incorrect chemical concentration, premature dilution, dosing pump failure.
recommended_action: Check chemical dosing pump operation; verify solution concentration manually; re-dose if needed.

label: Zone Full / Blocked
likely_cause: Downstream machine faulted or stopped (Rinser01, Filler01, or beyond).
recommended_action: Identify and resolve downstream root cause first. Zone will clear automatically when downstream resumes.

label: Zone Starved
description: `starved` = TRUE; no bottles arriving from Depalletizer01.
likely_cause: Depalletizer01 faulted, no pallet staged, or vacuum loss.
recommended_action: Check Depalletizer01 status; stage pallet if needed.

label: Motor Overload
likely_cause: Belt jam, foreign object on belt, worn belt tensioner.
recommended_action: Clear obstruction; check belt tension; reset overload relay.

missing_evidence.note: fault text references 'overload' but the sim exposes no such signal to corroborate it

label: Zone Full / Blocked
likely_cause: Downstream machine faulted or stopped (Rinser01, Filler01, or beyond).
recommended_action: Identify and resolve downstream root cause first. Zone will clear automatically when downstream resumes.

label: Zone Starved
description: `starved` = TRUE; no bottles arriving from Depalletizer01.
likely_cause: Depalletizer01 faulted, no pallet staged, or vacuum loss.
recommended_action: Check Depalletizer01 status; stage pallet if needed.

label: Motor Overload
likely_cause: Belt jam, foreign object on belt, worn belt tensioner.
recommended_action: Clear obstruction; check belt tension; reset overload relay.

missing_evidence.note: fault text references 'overload' but the sim exposes no such signal to corroborate it

label: No Pallet at Infeed
description: `pallet_present` = FALSE; no pallet at pick station.
likely_cause: Fork truck has not staged a pallet; pallet photoeye dirty or misaligned.
recommended_action: Stage full pallet; clean/realign pallet-present sensor.

label: Vacuum Loss
likely_cause: Low AirSystem01 header pressure; vacuum cup seal wear; cracked cup.
recommended_action: Check AirSystem01 header_pressure_psi; inspect vacuum cups; replace worn cups.

label: Jam Detected
likely_cause: Tipped bottle, double-bottle presentation, guide rail misalignment.
recommended_action: Safe-to-enter; clear obstruction; reset PackML.

label: Layer Count Error
description: `layer_count` does not decrement as expected; layer sensor fault.
likely_cause: Layer detection photoeye dirty or misaligned; pallet loaded off-center.
recommended_action: Clean and realign layer sensor; re-home pick head; reload pallet.

label: E-Stop / Interlock
description: Machine halted by E-Stop or interlock chain. `run_state` = ABORTED.
likely_cause: E-stop pressed, guard door open, downstream interlock (Capper 01 not ready), or CIP active.
recommended_action: Clear E-stop or interlock condition; confirm downstream ready; reset PackML.

label: Motor Overload
description: Motor overload relay tripped. `motor_current_amps` exceeded 8.5 A.
likely_cause: Mechanical jam in rotary carousel, worn rotary seal, jammed infeed starwheel, lubrication failure.
recommended_action: Clear jam, allow motor to cool 10 min, inspect rotary seals and lubrication; reset overload relay before restarting.

missing_evidence.note: fault text references 'overload' but the sim exposes no such signal to corroborate it

label: Nozzle Fault
description: One or more fill nozzles failed self-test or flow check. `nozzle_fault_count` > 0.
likely_cause: Blocked nozzle orifice (pulp, residue), worn nozzle tip seal, failed fill valve solenoid.
recommended_action: Identify faulted nozzle(s) via HMI valve diagnostic; clean or replace nozzle tip; confirm solenoid response.

label: Overfill
likely_cause: Bowl pressure too high (> 20 PSI), VFD speed too low (extended dwell), fill valve timing drift.
recommended_action: Reduce bowl pressure regulator set-point; verify VFD speed setpoint; run valve timing diagnostic.

label: Fill Variance High
likely_cause: Bowl level swings (float valve stuck), air entrainment in supply line, intermittent valve actuation.
recommended_action: Inspect bowl float valve; bleed air from supply line; verify product supply tank pressure stability.

label: Product Temp High
likely_cause: Refrigeration supply failure, product stagnant in bowl > 45 min, ambient heat during extended pause.
recommended_action: Drain and replace bowl product; check refrigeration; reduce pause duration between runs.

label: Low Bowl Pressure
likely_cause: Low supply tank level, failed/blocked pressure regulator, restricted supply line, low air pressure on pneumatic actuators, clogged fill nozzles.
recommended_action: Check `tank_level_percent`; inspect pressure regulator; verify AirSystem01 header pressure; inspect nozzles. See Troubleshooting § Underfill.

label: Tank Level Low
likely_cause: Product supply batch exhausted; refill pump failure; supply valve closed.
recommended_action: Notify product supply; do not run production below 15%; replenish batch.

label: Label Roll Low/Empty
likely_cause: Roll consumed; no splice performed in time.
recommended_action: Splice new roll before 5% threshold; confirm web threaded correctly after splice.

label: Web Tension Fault
likely_cause: Broken dancer spring, web brake failure, roll binding, web path obstruction.
recommended_action: Inspect dancer roller and brake pad; inspect web path for obstruction.

label: Registration Error
likely_cause: Web tension off, sensor contaminated, roll core run-out, glue temp low, servo error.
recommended_action: Check web tension; clean registration sensor; inspect roll seating; verify glue temp.

label: Glue Temp Out of Range
likely_cause: Heater element failure, thermocouple drift, cold start delay, setpoint error.
recommended_action: Check heater circuit; allow warm-up; inspect thermocouple.

label: High Reject Count
description: `reject_count` rising above baseline without specific fault active.
likely_cause: Vision camera contamination, label print defect, stuck reject gate.
recommended_action: Clean camera lens; inspect label stock quality; test reject gate.

label: Interlock / E-Stop
likely_cause: Glue temp not at warm-up threshold, roll empty, guard door open, E-stop, upstream fault.
recommended_action: Clear interlock condition; confirm upstream ready; reset PackML.

label: Label Sensor Blocked
likely_cause: Web break, label jam in web path, threading error after splice.
recommended_action: Inspect web path; re-thread web; check splice quality.

label: Robot E-Stop
description: `robot_ready` = FALSE; safety zone E-stop tripped. `run_state` = ABORTED. Upstream cases accumulate; CasePacker01 jam risk.
likely_cause: Safety zone intrusion, teach pendant in T1 mode, hardware E-stop pressed, robot servo fault.
recommended_action: Verify no person in robot cell; clear physical cause; twist-unlock E-stop mushroom; reset safety relay; acknowledge on teach pendant; return robot to home.

label: No Pallet at Station
description: `pallet_present` = FALSE; palletizer paused at layer-complete waiting for next pallet.
likely_cause: Fork truck has not staged empty pallet; pallet photoeye dirty or misaligned.
recommended_action: Stage empty pallet; clean/realign pallet-present sensor.

label: Infeed Jam
likely_cause: Misaligned case, deformed case, foreign object on infeed conveyor.
recommended_action: Press STOP; wait for robot to park at home; clear infeed jam; press START to resume.

label: Slip Sheet Empty
likely_cause: Magazine consumed; no operator restocked.
recommended_action: Load slip sheet magazine (100 sheets per load); manually trigger SLIP SHEET cycle to verify feed.

label: Low Water Pressure
likely_cause: Water supply valve partially closed, pressure regulator failure, upstream supply issue.
recommended_action: Check supply isolation valve; inspect pressure regulator; confirm building water pressure.

label: Rinse Valve Fault
likely_cause: Solenoid coil burned out, valve actuator seized, 24 VDC DO failure.
recommended_action: Check DO output to solenoid; megger coil; replace solenoid or valve assembly.

label: Reject Count High
description: `reject_count` rising; foreign material detected in bottles.
likely_cause: Bottle contamination from supplier, detection sensor calibration drift.
recommended_action: Inspect rejected bottles; check detection sensor calibration; notify QA.
